---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "All analysis, research, blog posts, and playground experiments"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: all-projects
    contents:
      - "analysis/*.qmd"
      - "research/*.qmd"
      - "blog/*.qmd"
      - "playground/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, date, categories]
    image-height: 280px
    page-size: 12
---

:::{#all-projects}
:::
